title: Tangy Smoky Polish Cucumber Salad
description: A refreshing Polish-inspired salad featuring smoky and tangy flavors, with anti-inflammatory benefits from fermented ingredients.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the sliced cucumbers and smoked paprika, tossing to coat.
In a blender or food processor, blend the sauerkraut, Greek yogurt, chopped fresh dill, apple cider vinegar, honey, salt, and black pepper until smooth.
Pour the sauerkraut mixture over the cucumber mixture and toss to combine.
Chill the salad in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, give the salad a good stir and adjust the seasoning if needed.
Serve the salad chilled, garnished with additional chopped fresh dill if desired.
Cover and refrigerate any leftovers for up to 24 hours.
Before serving leftovers, give the salad a good stir and adjust the seasoning if needed.
